response.justification: Maria Rodriguez's resume shows strong expertise in software development, web/mobile applications, and embedded systems, but lacks direct experience in hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator architecture—key requirements for this role. While she has worked with low-latency systems and performance optimization in software contexts, her background does not align with the hardware-centric or AI-specific demands of the Principal Performance Architect position.
strengths: Extensive experience in low-latency systems and performance optimization (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/second)
Proficient in multiple programming languages and paradigms (e.g., D, JavaScript, TypeScript, C/C++)
Demonstrated ability to work on diverse projects, including real-time systems and embedded development
concerns: No explicit experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design
Lacks background in AI accelerator architecture or deep-learning workload optimization
No evidence of working with SIMD/MIMD architectures or GPU workload analysis, as required
